author: rchudasa
body:
Updated the econd confid for HD unpacker

Contains the "MultiPlex" option to correct the unpacker when unpacking a Full HD ECON-D. 

github PR: https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50644

gitlab issue: https://gitlab.cern.ch/hgcal-dpg/hgcal-comm/-/issues/84

@pfs
title: Updated the econd confid for HD unpacker
